nav.reorderHint: Drag to reorder. Press Alt+Up or Alt+Down for keyboard reordering.
nav.hideActiveDisabled: Open another panel before hiding this one.

panelSub.agents: Live agent collaboration: status, incidents, and conversation
panelSub.provision: Watch an in-flight re-provision progress, streamed read-only
panelSub.audit: Append-only record of every terminal decision
panelSub.agentActivity: Per-agent timeline: which agent did what, when, and how
panelSub.handover: Who owns each of the 15 agents: stewards + maintainers
panelSub.blastRadius: Simulate reachable subgraph before a change
panelSub.dashboard: Healthy, risk, and cost, sourced from the audit log
panelSub.operatingOutcomes: Trends, baselines, and contributors for core operating metrics
panelSub.controlAssurance: Guard evidence, release blockers, and promotion readiness
panelSub.verticalOutcomes: Resilience, Change Safety, and Cost Governance results
panelSub.trustRouting: Tier mix, target bands, and routed event evidence
panelSub.rules: Every policy in the rule catalog, faceted
panelSub.workflowBuilder: Browse built-in workflows or design a new one by chatting
panelSub.llmCost: Token usage and spend per conversation, day, and month
panelSub.processes: Workflow runtime state and dynamic ontology-backed views
panelSub.reports: Declarative live boards rendered from the report catalog
panelSub.documents: Upload, scan, protect, and index governed documents
panelSub.settings: Display, accessibility, and local console preferences
panelSub.incidents: Incident status, disposition, and remediation history
panelSub.rca: Root cause: grounded hypothesis, citations, and response plan
panelSub.scope: Effective monitoring and automated-action scope by subscription and RG

reports.subtitle: Catalog-driven read-only boards. Select a report, set its declared variables, and render the current evidence window.
reports.empty: No reports are registered on this deployment.
reports.notFound: The selected report is not available.
reports.readyHint: Complete the required variables, then render the report.
reports.registry: Console renderers cover {supported} of {total} registered widget types. Unsupported types remain explicitly unavailable.
reports.viewPurpose: Read-only catalog reports rendered by the reporting subsystem. Widgets display server-owned evidence and never execute actions.

rca.subtitle: Root-cause analysis for one incident, projected read-only from the append-only audit log. An RCA result is a grounded hypothesis, never an authoritative verdict; execution eligibility stays with the risk gate and verifier.
rca.idle: Enter a correlation id and fetch to see its root-cause analysis.
rca.empty: No RCA hypothesis has been recorded for this incident yet.
rca.abstainedNotice: This hypothesis is not grounded. It routes to human approval (HIL) and is never treated as a confident cause.
rca.noResponse: No linked response action has been recorded for this incident yet.
rca.viewPurpose: Per-incident root-cause analysis projected from the audit log: tiered grounded hypotheses, citations, causal reasoning, and the linked response plan. Read-only; an RCA hypothesis answers why, never execute.

scope.subtitle: Effective monitoring and automated-action scope by subscription and resource group. Read-only: authoring a change generates a policy-as-code artifact you submit as a remediation / config PR (GitOps); the console never writes scope.
scope.notServed: The effective-scope view is not served by this deployment.
scope.viewPurpose: Effective monitoring scope (what FDAI observes) and automated-action scope (what an autonomous action may touch) by subscription and resource group, plus the hard RG-scoped executor identity boundary. Read-only; scope changes ship as policy-as-code PRs.

axisHint.monitoring: Which subscriptions and resource groups FDAI observes.
axisHint.action: Which subscriptions and resource groups an autonomous (non-approval) action may touch.

scope.emptyAxis: No scope entries for this axis.
scope.executorHint: The executor is an RG-scoped, action-whitelisted managed identity. This hard IAM ceiling cannot be widened by any governance scope.
scope.builderHint: Compose an include/exclude selection, then submit the generated artifact as a remediation / config PR. Nothing is applied from the console.
scope.builderEmpty: Add at least one entry to generate a scope artifact.
scope.artifactHint: Open a PR with this artifact. Approval, audit, and rollback come from Git; the console issues no privileged write.

incidents.subtitle: Incident-centric status and remediation history from the append-only audit log. Read-only; actions and approvals stay in Git and ChatOps.
incidents.select: Select an incident to inspect its remediation history.
incidents.selectNamed: Select {title} and show its remediation history
incidents.emptyHistory: No audit entries for this incident.
incidents.viewPurpose: Incident-centric roster and remediation history projected from the append-only audit log. Read-only.
incidents.historyShown: Showing {shown} of {total} history entries. Open the filtered audit log to continue browsing.

documents.subtitle: Upload governed documents through quarantine, protection checks, extraction, and indexing.
documents.visibilityNotice: This upload is not private to you. People who can access {collection} in FDAI may be able to view its filename, preview, extracted text, and citations. Do not upload secrets or content that this audience may not access.
documents.visibilityConfirm: I understand who can access this collection and confirm that these files are appropriate for that audience.
documents.dropHint: Files remain unavailable until mandatory safety checks complete.
documents.limits: Formats: {formats} · Maximum: {size} per file · {count} files per batch
documents.fileTooLarge: This file exceeds the advertised size limit.

labs.subtitle: Development-only design and UI experiments. These tools never mutate managed resources.
labs.logoLabDescription: Inspect the selected Cloud Aperture mark and alternative brand lockups.

settings.subtitle: Display and accessibility preferences stored in this browser.
settings.themeHint: Applied immediately across every console view.
settings.languageHint: Reloads the console so every navigation label uses the selected language.
settings.motionHint: Reduce decorative animation while preserving live state updates.
settings.readApiHint: The read-only endpoint supplying this console session.
settings.semanticVerificationHint: Shadow-check qualitative answers with the optional local NLI provider. Deterministic verification remains authoritative.

deck.label: Command deck
deck.noConversations: Start a conversation to keep it in this tab's history.
deck.removeCachedConversationHint: Remove this tab's cached transcript. Audit history is unchanged.
deck.clearCachedConversationHint: Clear this cached transcript. Audit history is unchanged.

workflowBuilder.subtitle: Browse the built-in workflows read-only, or design a new one by chatting with the builder. Describe what you want in plain words; it asks follow-up questions, generates the YAML, shows a visual of how it runs, and lets you test it. The console never commits - copy the YAML into a remediation PR.

overview.subtitle: Operating posture, measured outcomes, control assurance, and required attention.

section.outcomesHint: Results measured against the pinned baseline on the same evidence window.
section.assuranceHint: Guard evidence that permits, blocks, or holds autonomous operation.
section.organizationHint: Accountable separation of sensing, judgment, approval, execution, and audit.
section.verticalsHint: Resilience, Change Safety, and Cost Governance results over the same window.

status.label: Executive operating posture
status.summary: {rate}% autonomous resolution - Approvals pending: {hil} - {escapes} policy escapes
status.fallback: {events} audit events - Approvals pending: {hil} - autonomy evidence unavailable

evidence.unavailableHint: This section remains visible, but no measured value is inferred until its source is connected.

hero.title: Autonomous cloud operations
hero.window: Proven over the last {days} days - {samples} events
hero.syntheticHint: Dev harness: synthetic measurement, not a measured claim

attention.label: Requires attention
attention.title: {count} signals require review
attention.hilHint: Approval remains outside the read-only console.
attention.escapeHint: Review the promotion evidence before enforcement.
attention.unknownHint: The console does not infer a healthy state from missing guard data.
attention.clearHint: No approval backlog, policy escape, or failed guard is recorded.

organization.label: Agent organization
organization.title: Autonomy with separation of duties
organization.summary: The agent organization resolved {rate}% autonomously and held {hil} for human approval.

approvals.subtitle: High-risk actions waiting for a human approver. Approvals happen in ChatOps; this console remains read-only.
approvals.emptyBody: All autonomous decisions are within the risk gate's automatic envelope right now.
approvals.showingLatest: Showing the latest {shown} of {total} pending approvals.

analytics.trendUnavailable: Trend evidence is unavailable for this metric.
analytics.autonomyUnavailable: Autonomy measurement is not connected on this deployment.

outcomes.title: Operating outcomes
outcomes.subtitle: Measured results, baselines, trends, and the evidence behind each outcome.

assurance.title: Control assurance
assurance.subtitle: Deterministic guard evidence that permits, blocks, or holds autonomous operation.

verticals.title: Vertical outcomes
verticals.subtitle: Operational results and unresolved risk by FDAI vertical.
verticals.unavailable: This vertical is not present in the current measurement projection.

routing.title: Trust routing
routing.subtitle: How work is distributed across deterministic, reuse, and grounded reasoning tiers.
